project_name: 30-ui-bench - Sprint 11 ready packet for FK-aware and ontology-view follow-up
phase: Sprint 11 - FK-aware UX and ontology-view follow-up

user_stories.title: Prepare FK-aware and ontology-view follow-up
user_stories.description: Promote reusable Project 30 guidance for relation-aware UX after Project 37 confirms domain views, layer metadata, and remaining runtime dependencies.
acceptance_criteria: Project 37 confirms the required domain views and relation-aware runtime surfaces.
Project 30 guidance explains when to render links, breadcrumbs, grouped relationships, and pending-runtime states instead of raw ids.
Any dependency that still requires Project 37 seeding is captured as a timestamped handoff artifact rather than mocked into fake production data.

metadata.notes: Ready packet only at 2026-03-16 08:26 UTC. Promote after Sprint 10 is checked and acted.
